response.global_analysis: The video contains a medley of two songs: 'Seiza' (星座) and 'Kinmokusei' (金木犀). The reference JSON provided lyrics only for 'Kinmokusei', so I manually transcribed the lyrics for 'Seiza' and the on-screen narration text at 03:14. For 'Kinmokusei', I synchronized the provided reference lyrics to the audio, noting that the performance repeats the 'scream' (叫んでも) line instead of 'sing' (歌っても), which I corrected to match the actual audio and on-screen text. All timestamps are strictly tied to vocal activation and on-screen text appearance.

subtitles.original: 冥界Halloween Night! FBKINGDOM
subtitles.english: Underworld Halloween Night! FBKINGDOM

subtitles.original: 始まりはきっと 一つの願い
subtitles.english: It all started with a single wish, I'm sure

subtitles.original: それを抱いて 私たちは生まれた
subtitles.english: Holding onto that, we were born

subtitles.original: 孤独な夜空 震える指で
subtitles.english: In the lonely night sky, with trembling fingers...

subtitles.original: 点と点を繋げよう
subtitles.english: let's connect the dots together.

subtitles.original: 1次元では 寂しすぎるから
subtitles.english: Because one dimension is just too lonely...

subtitles.original: 私たちは 広がりを求めた
subtitles.english: we sought out more space to grow.

subtitles.original: 点は線となり 線は立体となり
subtitles.english: Points became lines, and lines became solids...

subtitles.original: そこに距離が生まれたけれど
subtitles.english: and though distance was born there...

subtitles.original: 3次元では ちょっと遠すぎるから
subtitles.english: because three dimensions are a bit too far apart...

subtitles.original: 私たちは 平面に求めた
subtitles.english: we sought for it on a flat plane.

subtitles.original: 点は線となり 線は星座となり
subtitles.english: Points became lines, and lines became constellations...

subtitles.original: この夜空を繋ぐよ
subtitles.english: connecting this night sky.

subtitles.original: 自分らしく いられる場所を
subtitles.english: For a place where I could truly be myself...

subtitles.original: 気づけばずっと 探していた
subtitles.english: I realized I'd been searching all along.

subtitles.original: 煌めく星よ この地に集え
subtitles.english: O sparkling stars, gather here on this earth...

subtitles.original: この旗を目印に
subtitles.english: using this flag as your guide.

subtitles.original: あの日君が いつもそこにいたから
subtitles.english: Because you were always there back then...

subtitles.original: 嬉しくて続けられたんだ今日まで
subtitles.english: I was so happy I could keep going until today.

subtitles.original: 忘れないでね 僕らの星座は
subtitles.english: Please don't forget, our constellation...

subtitles.original: 君がいたから生まれた
subtitles.english: was born because you were here.

subtitles.original: たとえ君が いつも時を生きても
subtitles.english: Even if you live through all of time...

subtitles.original: 何かを好きになる気持ち大切に
subtitles.english: please treasure that feeling of loving something.

subtitles.original: 歌い続けてね 僕らの星座は
subtitles.english: Keep on singing, for our constellation...

subtitles.original: 君がいるから生まれた
subtitles.english: was born because you are here.

subtitles.original: 夜空に輝き
subtitles.english: It shines in the night sky...

subtitles.original: 明日へと繋がる
subtitles.english: and connects us to tomorrow.

subtitles.original: 未来を
subtitles.english: To the future...

subtitles.original: 目指すよ
subtitles.english: we'll aim.

subtitles.original: 共に
subtitles.english: Together...

subtitles.original: 歩もう
subtitles.english: let's walk.

subtitles.original: これは僕らのキセキ。
subtitles.english: This is our miracle.

subtitles.original: 僕とキミと、大切なあの子の
subtitles.english: Of me, of you, and of that precious person...

subtitles.original: この王国で過ごす、かけがえのない日々を綴る
subtitles.english: chronicling the irreplaceable days spent in this kingdom...

subtitles.original: 僕たちの物語。
subtitles.english: this is our story.

subtitles.original: 小説「FBKINGDOM STORY」ED主題歌抜粋
subtitles.english: Excerpt from the Novel "FBKINGDOM STORY" Ending Theme

subtitles.original: 僕の居る意味はどこにあるの？
subtitles.english: Where can I find the meaning of my existence?

subtitles.original: 誰かに必要とされたかった
subtitles.english: I wanted to be needed by someone.

subtitles.original: 夢や希望も捨てきれないけど
subtitles.english: I can't completely throw away my dreams and hopes...

subtitles.original: なんとなく今を生きている
subtitles.english: yet I am just living my life day by day.

subtitles.original: どれだけ叫んでも
subtitles.english: No matter how much I scream...

subtitles.original: この声は君には届かない
subtitles.english: this voice won't reach you.

subtitles.original: どれだけ叫んでも
subtitles.english: No matter how much I scream...

subtitles.original: この声は君には届かない
subtitles.english: this voice won't reach you.

subtitles.original: 金木犀の匂いがした
subtitles.english: I catch the scent of osmanthus.

subtitles.original: 明日のことも忘れたくなった
subtitles.english: I wanted to forget all about tomorrow.

subtitles.original: いっそ逃げてしまおうかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if I should just run away...

subtitles.original: 僕は悲劇の主人公だ
subtitles.english: I am the protagonist of this tragedy.

subtitles.original: やさしいヒトで居たいな
subtitles.english: I want to stay as a kind person...

subtitles.original: でもそんな思いも偽善だ
subtitles.english: but even that thought is hypocritical.

subtitles.original: 誰も幸せにできないの
subtitles.english: I can't make anyone happy.

subtitles.original: 都合良いね、涙が出るの
subtitles.english: It's convenient, isn't it? Tears come out.
